ILLAOI_SOUL_LINK_POWER.title: Soul
ILLAOI_SOUL_LINK_POWER.description: Has no intent and does not act. When damaged, transfers that damage to its body.
ILLAOI_HUSK_POWER.title: Husk
ILLAOI_HUSK_POWER.description: At the end of the player's turn, all Tentacles automatically strike units with Husk. Stacks show remaining turns.
ILLAOI_HUSK_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of the player's turn, all Tentacles automatically strike units with Husk. Lasts [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns.
ILLAOI_TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_POWER.title: Temporary Strength
ILLAOI_TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_POWER.descript: Gain Strength. At the end of your turn, lose that much Strength.
ILLAOI_TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_POWER.smartDes: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Strength. At the end of your turn, lose that much Strength.
ILLAOI_TEMPORARY_DEXTERITY_POWER.title: Temporary Dexterity
ILLAOI_TEMPORARY_DEXTERITY_POWER.descrip: Gain Dexterity. At the end of your turn, lose that much Dexterity.
ILLAOI_TEMPORARY_DEXTERITY_POWER.smartDe: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Dexterity. At the end of your turn, lose that much Dexterity.
ILLAOI_FAITH_POWER.title: Faith
ILLAOI_FAITH_POWER.description: Tentacles deal additional damage equal to Faith.
ILLAOI_GROW_TIP_POWER.title: Grow
ILLAOI_TENTACLE_TIP_POWER.title: Tentacle
ILLAOI_TENTACLE_TIP_POWER.description: Tentacles do not act. When [gold]Commanded[/gold], they strike the chosen target for [blue]3[/blue] base damage plus [gold]Faith[/gold].
ILLAOI_COMMAND_TIP_POWER.title: Command
ILLAOI_COMMAND_TIP_POWER.description: Command all [gold]Tentacles[/gold] to strike the chosen target. Each Tentacle deals [blue]3[/blue] base damage plus [gold]Faith[/gold].
ILLAOI_DRAIN_POWER.title: Drain
ILLAOI_DRAIN_POWER.description: Whenever a Tentacle attacks a unit with Husk, gain Block equal to Drain.
ILLAOI_DRAIN_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever a Tentacle attacks a unit with Husk, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Block.
ILLAOI_ANCIENT_GOD_PROPHET_POWER.title: Ancient God Prophet
ILLAOI_ANCIENT_GOD_PROPHET_POWER.descrip: The first time you Command each turn, gain [gold]Faith[/gold] equal to this power.
ILLAOI_ANCIENT_GOD_PROPHET_POWER.smartDe: The first time you Command each turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Faith[/gold].
ILLAOI_SOUL_IMPACT_POWER.title: Soulquake
ILLAOI_SOUL_IMPACT_POWER.description: Whenever you shatter a monster's Soul, stun its body. If the body is already stunned, apply [blue]2[/blue] Weak and [blue]2[/blue] Vulnerable to it.
ILLAOI_NAGAKABOUROS_DESCENDS_POWER.title: Nagakabouros Descends
ILLAOI_NAGAKABOUROS_DESCENDS_POWER.descr: The first time each turn you pull out a Soul, command Tentacles to strike that Soul.
ILLAOI_TIDECALLER_POWER.title: Tide Herald
ILLAOI_TIDECALLER_POWER.description: The first time you Command each turn, draw cards equal to this power.
ILLAOI_TIDECALLER_POWER.smartDescription: The first time you Command each turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card.
ILLAOI_RELENTLESS_FAITH_POWER.title: Unyielding Faith
ILLAOI_RELENTLESS_FAITH_POWER.descriptio: Each turn, the first times you play an Attack with a target, command Tentacles to strike that target. The number of times equals this power.
ILLAOI_RELENTLESS_FAITH_POWER.smartDescr: The first [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time each turn you play an Attack with a target, command Tentacles to strike that target.
ILLAOI_GROWTH_BLOCK_POWER.title: Deep Priestess
ILLAOI_GROWTH_BLOCK_POWER.description: Whenever you Grow, gain [gold]Faith[/gold] equal to this power for each Tentacle grown.
ILLAOI_GROWTH_BLOCK_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever you Grow, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Faith[/gold] for each Tentacle grown.
ILLAOI_RHYTHM_OF_MOTION_POWER.title: Tide Rhythm
ILLAOI_RHYTHM_OF_MOTION_POWER.descriptio: The first time you play a Skill each turn, gain temporary Dexterity equal to this power.
ILLAOI_RHYTHM_OF_MOTION_POWER.smartDescr: The first time you play a Skill each turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] temporary Dexterity.
ILLAOI_FERVOR_OF_MOTION_POWER.title: Tide Fervor
ILLAOI_FERVOR_OF_MOTION_POWER.descriptio: The first time you play an Attack each turn, gain temporary Strength equal to this power.
ILLAOI_FERVOR_OF_MOTION_POWER.smartDescr: The first time you play an Attack each turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] temporary Strength.
ILLAOI_WATCHFUL_IDOL_POWER.title: Vigil Idol
ILLAOI_WATCHFUL_IDOL_POWER.description: The first time you gain temporary Dexterity each turn, gain Block equal to this power.
ILLAOI_WATCHFUL_IDOL_POWER.smartDescript: The first time you gain temporary Dexterity each turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Block.
ILLAOI_SEA_ANSWERS_POWER.title: The Sea Replies
ILLAOI_SEA_ANSWERS_POWER.description: Whenever you shatter a monster's Soul, gain Energy equal to this power.
ILLAOI_SEA_ANSWERS_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you shatter a monster's [gold]Soul[/gold], gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
ILLAOI_NEXT_TURN_DRAW_POWER.title: Soul Readiness
ILLAOI_NEXT_TURN_DRAW_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, draw additional cards equal to this power.
ILLAOI_NEXT_TURN_DRAW_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your next turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional card.
ILLAOI_DIVINE_FORM_POWER.title: Divine Form
ILLAOI_DIVINE_FORM_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain Faith and Grow equal to this power.
ILLAOI_DIVINE_FORM_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Faith[/gold] and [gold]Grow[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
ILLAOI_NEXT_TURN_FAITH_POWER.title: Abyssal Trance
ILLAOI_NEXT_TURN_FAITH_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, gain Faith equal to this power.
ILLAOI_NEXT_TURN_FAITH_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your next turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Faith[/gold].
